subcodes.first_line: O thou noble inquirer, know thou of a certainty that this bird hath fallen into the clutches of the deniers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلم یا ایها السائل الجلیل بان هذا الطیر قد وقع بین مخالب المنکرین
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
